info.title: OpenPix.Cli
info.description: Command Line Interface (CLI) for generating and decoding Brazilian Pix codes (Static & Dynamic).

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OpenPix CLI - Tool for generating and decoding Pix codes

commands.name: gen
commands.description: Generates a Static or Dynamic Pix QR Code

commands.name: decode
commands.description: Decodes and validates a Pix string
